slides.title: ProductiveYou
slides.voiceover: ProductiveYou — the discipline operating system for the next billion knowledge workers.
The World Health Organization estimates depression and anxiety cost the global economy one trillion dollars in lost productivity each year.

slides.title: The 21-day myth has bankrupted a generation.
slides.voiceover: The twenty-one day myth has bankrupted a generation of habit apps. Science says sixty-six days. Most apps lose ninety percent of users in four weeks. They punish missed days — the opposite of how behavior actually changes.

slides.title: A 2-year monk-mode operating system.
slides.voiceover: Our solution is a two-year monk-mode operating system. Non-negotiables paired with daily habits. Streaks survive a missed day. Journal, todo, and wrapped recap in one product. Plus a Chrome companion that turns every new tab into a discipline checkpoint.

slides.title: Two adjacent markets, one product.
slides.voiceover: We sit at the intersection of two compounding markets — productivity apps at fourteen point five billion, and mental health apps at eight point six billion, both growing double digits.
We are not selling a habit. We are selling seven hundred and thirty days. James Clear sold twenty million copies telling people to build small habits. We sell the operating system that runs them.

slides.title: Freemium » Pro » Coach.
slides.voiceover: Business model is freemium consumer SaaS. Pro at six dollars a month. Coach tier at twenty-four dollars per seat for therapists, coaches, and corporate wellness. The Chrome extension is a no-friction growth loop into the web app.

slides.title: The math investors actually care about.
slides.voiceover: Blended ARPU around forty-two dollars. CAC nine dollars driven by content and the extension referral loop. Eighty-eight percent gross margins. Payback under four months. LTV to CAC of eleven at scale.

slides.title: Three tailwinds, one window.
slides.voiceover: Three tailwinds. Mental health spend is up fifty-four percent post-pandemic. Gen Z spending on self-improvement apps quadrupled since twenty-twenty. And AI tooling cut our build cost ten-x.

slides.title: Where existing players leave a gap.
slides.voiceover: Streaks and Habitica are gamified and fragile. Calm and Headspace are content with no tracking. Notion and Todoist demand a setup tax. We win on dual-system, journaling, Wrapped, and browser surface area.

slides.title: From v1 to platform.
slides.voiceover: Roadmap: native mobile in Q one. Coach mode and B two B pilots in Q two. AI nudges trained on consented journal sentiment in Q three. And a viral Wrapped two point oh in Q four.

slides.title: Raise: $1.2M Seed
slides.voiceover: We are raising one point two million seed. Eighteen month runway to two hundred fifty thousand users, one point four million in A R R, and live coach-tier pilots. Visit productive you dot lovable dot app.
